nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely. Cloudy. Low around 59, with temperatures rising to around 61 overnight. Southwest wind around 6 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

nws.name: Tuesday
nws.shortForecast: Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Mostly Sunny
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 7am. Mostly sunny, with a high near 75. West wind 7 to 20 mph, with gusts as high as 29 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

nws.name: Tuesday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly clear. Low around 51, with temperatures rising to around 53 overnight. West wind 7 to 20 mph, with gusts as high as 29 mph.

nws.name: Wednesday
